title: Senior Software Engineer
short_description: Highly skilled and motivated software engineer with expertise in data engineering and a strong background in Java, Python, and JavaScript. Experienced in a variety of frameworks, libraries, cloud platforms, and version control systems. Proficient in Agile methodologies and task management tools. Bachelor's degree in Computer Science from BSUIR.

python: 10+ years of hands-on experience in software engineering across multiple business domains, with a strong focus on Python backend development and platform engineering over the last years.
Wide Technical Range: Proficient in Python and Java, experienced in cloud platforms (Azure), databases, messaging systems, and CI/CD pipelines.
java: Senior Java Engineer with 10+ years hands-on experience in software engineering, with a strong foundation in backend development and microservices.
Wide Technical Range: Proficient in Java and Python, experienced in cloud platforms (Azure), databases, messaging systems, and CI/CD pipelines.
common: Backend & Platform Engineering: Designed and developed microservices and service-oriented solutions, including cloud-native systems on Azure with async processing. Experienced in migrating on-premises solutions to cloud infrastructure.
Communication & Visibility: Regularly presented technical progress and solutions to cross-functional audiences of up to 40 people across multiple countries and timezones.

Integrated a multi-tool AI workflow (GitHub Copilot agent/ask/autocomplete, Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, Microsoft Copilot) into day-to-day engineering practice over 12+ months, reducing boilerplate authoring time, improving first-draft code quality.

education.name: BSUIR, Bachelor's degree in Computer Science

prizes_appraisals: 2nd diploma diploma of Republic Olympiad in informatics 2010.
Participant of ACM ICPC Belarus and Baltics Regional Contest (ACM 1/4 finals).

java: Designed and implemented CMDB service registry in Java 19 / Spring Boot 3 / Hibernate, deployed on Kubernetes (k3s/k8s).
Delivered full feature lifecycle on Java service: requirements → design → implementation → PostgreSQL schema migrations via Liquibase → deployment.
Designed new approach (service → library) to reduce complexity and increase reliability of ServiceNOW API integration.
Led a refactor to simplify control flow and isolate responsibilities, enabling effective test coverage.
python: Designed and implemented new approach (from service to library) to reduce complexity, latency and increase reliability of interaction with ServiceNOW API.
Took key role in design and development of new solution for automation of ServiceNOW items processing — cloud-native, Azure services, async processing using Python AsyncIO.
Led a refactor to simplify control flow and isolate responsibilities, enabling effective test coverage and improving maintainability of the codebase.
common: Took part in requirements discussion and solution design with clients and stakeholders.

Integrated a multi-tool AI workflow (GitHub Copilot, Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini) into day-to-day engineering practice over 12+ months, reducing boilerplate authoring time and compressing research-to-solution cycles.

projects.name: Optimus (Cloud)
projects.description: Cloud native solution for building automations with specific business needs. Highly increased flexibility and variety of supported use cases and technologies in comparison with previous solution. Utilizes Azure services, async processing and part of it designed to be used as a library to be easily integrated into different services.
projects.technologies: Python 3, AsyncIO, ServiceNow, Ansible, AWX, Azure, Azure Storage (Table, Queue), Pytest, Git, JIRA, Confluence
projects.responsibilities: Initial implementation of the solution, services support and development of new features, bug fixing, providing documentation, participating in requirements discussion and solution design.
